rationale: 12x12 finite-grid covering existence at B=1000 — bounded version closure that sharpens slot740's 8x8 at B=500. Honest hedge: Monte-Carlo on the 1135-prime pool caps coverage at 0.751 for K×L, strongly suggesting unsatisfiability. Either way produces a measurable advance over slot740 (covered = strict strengthening; uncoverable = clean impossibility) but neither resolves the open E203 unbounded conjecture (the lift problem remains open). Twin sketch erdos203_grid_16x16_B2000 exists with same shape at a stricter parameter.
